prompt: Use GPT-5.5 Pro Extended Thinking to write the best possible ChatGPT Deep Research prompt, then run ChatGPT Deep Research to produce an executive-summary PDF for research leads evaluating Braindough, a local-first Python uv/mise/hk/just monorepo for in-silico brain-modeling experiments using Meta/Facebook TRIBE v2 and fake-backend simulations. The report must synthesize local fake and bounded TRIBE perturbation/optimization artifacts, repository structure, TRIBE v2 and encoding-model literature, natural-scene benchmarks, counterfactual and minimal-edit stimulus generation, virtual lesion and ablation analysis, closed-loop activation optimization, semantic maps, audiovisual integration, key findings, limitations, recommended charts, and future directions. It must distinguish fake-backend software-validation artifacts and TRIBE model-predicted responses from measured human neural data, respect the external storage root, avoid overclaiming, cite sources, and provide a polished PDF plus source and evidence-gap notes.

source.visible_status: In progress; current visible step is artifact inventory and provenance extraction; 174 searches visible.

title: Braindough Executive Summary Deep Research
